overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxury cyberpunk penthouse in Night City. The player walks from a rain-slicked rooftop pool terrace with city views into a neon-lit modern apartment interior featuring contemporary art and high-end furnishings.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop infinity pool terrace with city skyline views

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet poolside terrace, passing lounge chairs and planters with trees

entered.detail: rectangular pool with reflective water surface mirroring the night lights
modern white lounge chairs arranged along the pool edge
transparent glass safety barrier at the terrace edge overlooking the city
distant illuminated skyscrapers visible through the fog
sculptural trees in large white rectangular planters

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a luxurious rooftop terrace at night, passing an infinity pool that reflects the teal and magenta neon lights. White lounge chairs and potted trees line the path while the foggy Night City skyline looms in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway leading to penthouse entrance

events.description: moving from open terrace into the covered building entrance area
transitioning from outdoor foggy night to interior neon lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching the glass entrance door and stepping inside the penthouse

entered.detail: modern dark facade with teal neon accent lighting along the edges
glowing cyan LED strips lining the building overhang
large transparent doorway leading into the apartment interior

segments.scene_description: The player moves under the building's overhang, passing from the open terrace into a sheltered entrance area. Teal neon strips illuminate the modern facade as the player approaches and enters through the glass doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: penthouse entry hall with digital art installations

events.description: game UI interaction prompt appears for the pink wall sculpture

agents.ego_description: moving through the entry hall examining the neon sculptures and wall displays

entered.detail: large illuminated wall display with swirling blue-green digital patterns
glowing pink organic-form sculpture displayed in a glass case
hexagonal patterned ceiling light with warm white illumination
dark leather sectional seating in the living area

segments.scene_description: Inside the penthouse, the player explores a luxurious entry hall featuring a glowing pink sculpture and digital wall art. The space is illuminated by neon accent lighting and a geometric ceiling fixture, with modern leather seating visible in the living area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plan living and dining area with panoramic windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the main living space toward the dining area with city views through the windows

entered.detail: contemporary dining table with white upholstered chairs
black bar counter with stools and neon underlighting
floor-to-ceiling window showing the night cityscape outside

segments.scene_description: The player continues into the spacious open-plan living area, passing a modern dining set and kitchen island with neon accents. Large windows reveal the city outside while the geometric ceiling fixture remains visible overhead as the exploration continues deeper into the apartment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked rooftop terrace into the neon-drenched interior of a luxury cyberpunk penthouse. It begins by gliding past an infinity pool reflecting teal and magenta lights, moving along a path of white lounge chairs and potted trees against a foggy city skyline. As the camera moves under the building's overhang, the open air gives way to a sheltered entrance illuminated by teal neon strips before passing through a glass doorway. The scene then shifts into a lavish entry hall featuring a glowing pink sculpture and digital wall art under a geometric ceiling fixture. Finally, the movement flows deeper into a spacious open-plan living area, passing a modern dining set and kitchen island with neon accents while large windows maintain a visual connection to the city outside.
